get.description: Returns a list of all Agents.

parameters.name: pmm_agent_id
parameters.description:
Return only Agents started by this pmm-agent.
Exactly one of these parameters should be present: pmm_agent_id, node_id, service_id.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description:
Return only Agents that provide insights for that Node.
Exactly one of these parameters should be present: pmm_agent_id, node_id, service_id.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description:
Return only Agents that provide insights for that Service.
Exactly one of these parameters should be present: pmm_agent_id, node_id, service_id.

parameters.name: agent_type
parameters.description: Return only agents of a particular type.

post.description: Adds an Agent to Inventory. Only one agent at a time can be passed.

get.description: Returns a single Agent by ID.

put.description: Updates an Agent in Inventory. Only one agent at a time can be passed.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of log lines to this value. Pass 0 for no limit.

hr.description: High resolution. In JSON should be represented as a string with number of seconds with `s` suffix.

mr.description: Medium resolution. In JSON should be represented as a string with number of seconds with `s` suffix.

lr.description: Low resolution. In JSON should be represented as a string with number of seconds with `s` suffix.

commonMetricsResolutions.description: MetricsResolutions represents Prometheus exporters metrics resolutions.

commonStringMap.description: A wrapper for map[string]string. This type allows to distinguish between an empty map and a null value.

v1AgentStatus.description:
AgentStatus represents actual Agent status.

 - AGENT_STATUS_STARTING: Agent is starting.
 - AGENT_STATUS_INITIALIZATION_ERROR: Agent encountered error when starting.
 - AGENT_STATUS_RUNNING: Agent is running.
 - AGENT_STATUS_WAITING: Agent encountered error and will be restarted automatically soon.
 - AGENT_STATUS_STOPPING: Agent is stopping.
 - AGENT_STATUS_DONE: Agent has been stopped or disabled.
 - AGENT_STATUS_UNKNOWN: Agent is not connected, we don't know anything about it's state.

v1VMAgent.description:
VMAgent runs on Generic or Container Node alongside pmm-agent.
It scrapes other exporter Agents that are configured with push_metrics_enabled
and uses Prometheus remote write protocol to push metrics to PMM Server.
